PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD OF ARBITRATOR, DATED JUL-27-2012.
